message:
feat(diary): Add listRecentDiaries for time-based filtering

List diary entries from the past N days, useful for stats command
and recent activity summaries. Leverages loadAllDiaries and filters
by timestamp against cutoff date.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
